---
name: Bug report
about: Something broke or behaves unexpectedly
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A short description of the observed behavior.

## What you expected

What you expected to happen instead.

## Reproduction

The smallest sequence of commands or steps that triggers the bug.

```sh

```

## Environment

- OS:
- Python version (`uv run python --version`):
- Node version (`node --version`):
- `claude --version`:
- Commit (`git rev-parse HEAD`):

## Logs

Relevant lines from `~/Library/Logs/invisible-college/autopilot.log`
or the failing command's output. Operational telemetry (dollar
amounts, token counts) should be left out per the project's
local-only-cost policy.
